name: Thermal properties
description: Properties related to heat transfer and thermal behavior of nuclear fuel materials

name: Mechanical properties
description: Properties describing material response to applied forces

name: Nuclear properties
description: Properties related to nuclear interactions, cross-sections, and fission behavior

name: Physical properties
description: Fundamental physical properties such as density, crystal structure, and phase transitions

name: Chemical properties
description: Properties related to chemical reactivity, corrosion, and compatibility

name: Optical properties
description: Properties related to light interaction with materials

name: Electrical properties
description: Properties related to electrical conductivity and electromagnetic behavior
